queries.question: Give me descriptions of exhibitions each art gallery has on display.
queries.sql: SELECT Exhibitions.Description  from Art_Galleries_Exhibitions join Exhibitions on Art_Galleries_Exhibitions.ExhibitionID = Exhibitions.ExhibitionID join Art_Galleries on Art_Galleries_Exhibitions.GalleryID = Art_Galleries.GalleryID   GROUP BY Art_Galleries_Exhibitions.ExhibitionID HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Art_Galleries_Exhibitions.GalleryID) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Art_Galleries)

queries.question: Give me descriptions of exhibitions each art gallery has on display.
queries.sql: select art_galleries.name , exhibitions.description from Art_Galleries_Exhibitions join Exhibitions on Art_Galleries_Exhibitions.ExhibitionID = Exhibitions.ExhibitionID join Art_Galleries on Art_Galleries_Exhibitions.GalleryID = Art_Galleries.GalleryID
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?description WHERE {
  ?art_galleries_exhibitions a :Art_Galleries_Exhibitions .
  ?exhibitions a :Exhibitions .
  ?art_galleries_exhibitions p:hasExhibitions ?exhibitions .
  ?art_galleries a :Art_Galleries .
  ?art_galleries_exhibitions p:hasArt_Galleries ?art_galleries .
  ?art_galleries p:name ?name .
  ?exhibitions p:Description ?description .
}

queries.question: For each art gallery, list the types and descriptions of the exhibitions.
queries.sql: select art_galleries.name , exhibitions.type , exhibitions.description from Art_Galleries_Exhibitions join Exhibitions on Art_Galleries_Exhibitions.ExhibitionID = Exhibitions.ExhibitionID join Art_Galleries on Art_Galleries_Exhibitions.GalleryID = Art_Galleries.GalleryID
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?type ?description WHERE {
  ?art_galleries_exhibitions a :Art_Galleries_Exhibitions .
  ?exhibitions a :Exhibitions .
  ?art_galleries_exhibitions p:hasExhibitions ?exhibitions .
  ?art_galleries a :Art_Galleries .
  ?art_galleries_exhibitions p:hasArt_Galleries ?art_galleries .
  ?art_galleries p:name ?name .
  ?exhibitions p:Type ?type .
  ?exhibitions p:Description ?description .
}

queries.question: Show me the types and descriptions of the exhibitions taking place in each art gallery.
queries.sql: SELECT Exhibitions.Type, Exhibitions.Description  from Art_Galleries_Exhibitions join Exhibitions on Art_Galleries_Exhibitions.ExhibitionID = Exhibitions.ExhibitionID join Art_Galleries on Art_Galleries_Exhibitions.GalleryID = Art_Galleries.GalleryID   GROUP BY Art_Galleries_Exhibitions.ExhibitionID HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Art_Galleries_Exhibitions.GalleryID) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Art_Galleries)

queries.question: Which type of exhibition is common to every art gallery?
queries.sql: SELECT Exhibitions.Type  from Art_Galleries_Exhibitions join Exhibitions on Art_Galleries_Exhibitions.ExhibitionID = Exhibitions.ExhibitionID join Art_Galleries on Art_Galleries_Exhibitions.GalleryID = Art_Galleries.GalleryID   GROUP BY Art_Galleries_Exhibitions.ExhibitionID HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Art_Galleries_Exhibitions.GalleryID) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Art_Galleries)

queries.question: For each art gallery, show me the types of exhibitions they have

SELECT ?name ?type WHERE {

  ?art_galleries_exhibitions p:hasExhibitions ?exhibitions .
  ?art_galleries a :Art_Galleries .
  ?art_galleries_exhibitions p:hasArt_Galleries ?art_galleries .
  ?art_galleries p:name ?name .
  ?exhibitions p:Type ?type .
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Show me the types and descriptions of the exhibitions taking place in each art gallery.
Give me descriptions of exhibitions each art gallery has on display.
What type of exhibitions is at every art gallery?
